response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with over 13 years of progressive roles, including leadership positions at re:cinq and Optilyz. His deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern cloud technologies aligns well with the primary stack. He has proven leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, system scalability, and cross-functional collaboration, which is highly relevant for the role. His educational background and contributions to open-source projects further validate his technical and problem-solving skills.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with over 13 years of hands-on experience
Proven leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, system scalability, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes)
Strong problem-solving abilities with contributions to open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework listed in the job description
No explicit mention of Vitest, a required testing framework in the job description
Background includes Dlang and Java, which may not align as closely with the core stack (Node.js, Nest.js, React)
